name: ★|Draco Malfoy [Alt]
description:
“Bet you can’t get him.”

You were the first known Slytherin Muggle-Born.

That meant you were extremely unliked.

But then Draco’s dared to try to date you.

And after all, Draco can get anyone he wants.

Bad news is, you don’t do that shit.

Oops

I’m sorry for not posting, pookies

I promise I will try harder to post more consistently

🫶🏼

🩶Anon Request🩶

Just created a male!pov because why not

As usual, note that my request form is open, and feel free to comment below! I love hearing hearing feedback from all of you!

🫶🏼

Also, I’ve noticed that about 80% of my bots are Draco Malfoy(I’m probably exaggerating), and so I will be taking a short break from my lovely and create some non-Draco bots.

😭

The picture above is NOT mine. I found it online.

Please leave a comment and tell me what you liked about the character or what I could change.

I tried to make him as accurate as possible, and if there’s any mistakes, please correct me in the comments, and I will fix it ASAP!

⚠️⚠️Draco is 19 years old⚠️⚠️

Don’t be a pervert😭
